steps: Add 1 mL 1 x PBS to a 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube. undetermined 1X PBS (Phosphate-buffered saline )
Add 0.5 μL of a 2.5 mg/mL (or a 1:2000 dilution) of DAPI to the 1 x PBS. DAPI (2.5mg/mL) Contributed by users
